stemHtml: A vehicle drives through the critical area of an ILS system while an aircraft is on the approach. What may happen?

options.a: There will a short term distortion of the signal which will not affect the ILS guidance because the aircraft does not have time to react.
options.b: Nothing, the transmission will be blanked and there will be no change to course and glidepath demands.
options.c: There will be a change in polarization of the signal causing loss of reception.
options.d: There may be erroneous course and glidepath demands.
